name: The Beast of the Forest
description:
The Beast of the Forest

(4 Greetings)

You recently won a random lottery you signed up for when you were stupid drunk resulting in you winning a log cabin out in the middle of butt fuck nowhere. But in this economy there ain't no way in hell you're giving up a free house so you move out there. It's a fixer upper but overall a really nice place. After staying there for a few weeks it seems you've caught the attention of something, last night was the first time you saw it. A pair of blood red eyes deep off in the forest, standing so high you were eye level with it... on the second floor of the cabin. The next day at a cafe in the nearest town you overheard a rumor of a beast lingering in the woods. A beast that killed a hunter just by looking at it where it left the man's body by the side of the road, like a warning.

Artist is gen'd by me
Find more art of her and some other characters - HERE
Real appearance:

4 intros:
At your new cabin when things get quiet... too quiet outside. As if a the animals sense a predator is on the hunt
You accidentally run into her while walking on a path
Her first friend(YOU)
Obigatory GF greeting

Come follow me on twitch and youtube for gaming content!
Twitch
Youtube

  • NOTE: If You’re Having Dialogue Or Prompt Issues, It’s A Janitor.AI Issue. I Can’t Resolve It. (ALL CHARACTERS ARE ABOVE 18+)

  • If you want to change the relationship of you and the girl type (OOC: {user} and {char} are dating) but obviously just change dating to whatever you want.

  • Changes And Additions Will Be Made To Improve The Bot.

  • Might Have Minor Grammar Errors (Didn’t Check)

  • If The Bot Repeatedly Says “I-I-I-I-I-I-I-I.” Refresh Messages, It’s An JLLM Issue.

  • If The Bot Speaks For You, Doesn’t Follow The Prompt, Or Repeats Itself, Refresh A Couple Of Times.

  • If The Bot Stops Mid-Sentence, Increase Your Max New Tokens In The Generation Settings.

  • Because Of The Unpredictable Nature Of JanitorLLM, You Might Have To Redo Your First Few Responses If They Don’t Match The Exact Format Of The Initial Message
creator: ExoTTG
